_description: Maps every numeric claim used in Act IV deliverables to its authoritative source file and field path. Use this to verify any figure before citing it.

tau2_bench_pass_at_1.notes: τ²-Bench retail domain baseline. Not re-run in Act IV — score_log.json is the graded reference.

probe_pass_rate_day1.notes: Day-1 baseline before any Act III prompt fixes.

probe_pass_rate_run2.notes: Run 2 results after Act III prompt engineering. Recorded in probe_results.json.

probe_pass_rate_act4.notes: Act IV run result with retry logic. 1 failure is probe #7 (documented label mismatch, correct routing). Retry logic resolved all prior LLM truncation errors.

weekly_openrouter_spend_usd.notes: $4.62 used of $36.11 weekly limit as of 2026-04-24.

stalled_thread_rate_manual_lower.source_file: TRP1 Challenge Week 10_ Conversion Engine for Sales Automation.md
stalled_thread_rate_manual_lower.source_field: Tenacious CFO interview — stalled reply rate
stalled_thread_rate_manual_lower.notes: 30–40% of positive replies result in stalled threads without automated follow-up (manual baseline).

stalled_thread_rate_manual_upper.source_file: TRP1 Challenge Week 10_ Conversion Engine for Sales Automation.md
stalled_thread_rate_manual_upper.source_field: Tenacious CFO interview — stalled reply rate

cost_per_qualified_lead_lower_usd.notes: $3.20–$4.37 per qualified lead based on $4.62/week spend and 1–2 qualified leads per week estimate.

series_a_funding_arcana_usd.notes: Used as grounding fact in probe suite. '$14M Series A, March 2026' appears in briefs and last_email.

tau2_bench_gpt41mini_pass_at_1.notes: GPT-4.1-mini, 1 trial × 30 tasks. Comparison run only. No 95% CI available — 1 trial is statistically insufficient. Gemini Flash outperforms by 19.4pp on the same retail task suite. Model: openai/gpt-4.1-mini via OpenRouter.
